/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/BossEnemy.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/BossWeapon.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Door.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Entity.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/GameState.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Heart.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Level.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/MeleeEnemy.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/MenuButton.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/MenuState.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Object.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/PauseState.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Player.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Projectile.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/RangedEnemy.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/ResourceManager.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Room.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/State.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Utils.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/Weapon.cc.o CMakeFiles/sfml.dir/src/main.cc.o -o sfml  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-network.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
